narrative:
Bay Twp township has 979 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
